name: knowledge-workflow
description: Codex plugin packaging for Knowledge Workflow Skills.

interface.longDescription: Knowledge Workflow helps Codex maintain repository-backed project knowledge and delivery state. It includes Skills for routing, knowledge capture, audits, status reports, Kanban maintenance, implementation, review, local worklists, and maintainer administration, with write-capable actions kept behind explicit approval boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Knowledge Workflow to route this repository work.
Check this repository's knowledge workflow status.
Help me capture approved project knowledge.
